'''Kine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Eiattu pirates|TIE]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A former [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], Kine continued to aid his former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] comrades during their crusades against the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Radix]], Kine joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and ascended to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], but left his post to became a small-time [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. Maintaining ties with several high-ranking [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] and organizations across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Kine was an active pirate at the time of the birth of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="LC" />

During this time, Kine was approached by Republic loyalist [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] for a mission to locate a group of anti-Republic pirates. Keeping his Imperial past a secret, Kine agreed to assist in the hunt, tracking the pirates' activity to his homeworld of Radix in the [[Abraxas system/Legends|Abraxas system]]. At the same time, Kine had been contacted by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harme Kiela]] of the Imperial Navy, who ordered him to accompany Calrissian and free [[Air Marshal]] [[Von Asch]] from a Republic prison. Working undercover for Kiela, Kine shot Calrissian in the back when they were [[Mission to Radix|ambushed]] by pirates on Radix. Leaving Calrissian for dead, Kine attempted to complete his assignment but was incapacitated by [[Isolde Siro]] and Calrissian. Kine, with the help of Lieutenant Kiela, attacked Siro and revealed his secret weapon: a stolen [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Waving the weapon, Kine tried to kill Siro but was thwarted by Asch, the man he was trying to rescue. Asch, having decided to freely join the Republic, stood in the way of Kine's killing stroke and sacrificed his life for Siro. Shocked at what had just transpired, Kine failed to regain his wits in time to defend himself against Siro, who killed the pirate with a well-placed blaster shot.<ref name="LC" />
